RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0002 Page 3 of 4 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 13/04/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 146 1,991 6,278 26/11/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 6,278 17/12/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 811 2,255 7,722 20/03/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 890 416 7,248 19/12/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 512 - 6,736 22/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 6,736 21/11/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 6,736 14/07/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 6,736 02/10/2025 UTILITY BILL 813 - 5,923 15/11/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 5,923 12/01/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 370 - 5,553 25/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 562 909 5,900 24/10/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 645 - 5,255 21/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 321 - 4,934 10/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 39 - 4,895 26/04/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 4,895 18/09/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 284 5,179 27/04/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 35 - 5,144
